questionHtml: Formulate equation(s) for the conversion of coal and steam to methane.
markschemeHtml:
ALTERNATIVE 1:

2C (s) + 2H2O (g) → CH4 (g) + CO2 (g) ✔

 

ALTERNATIVE 2:

C (s) + 2H2O (g) → CO (g) + H2 (g) AND 3H2 (g) + CO (g) → CH4 (g) + H2O (g) ✔

 

Accept “3C (s) + 2H2O (g) → CH4 (g) + 2CO (g)”.

meta.title: Formulate equation(s) for the conversion of coal and steam to methane.
